posts.caption:
Automark is now on Nyerere Road.

You can now explore Automark Certified Pre-Owned Vehicles inside the Toyota Tanzania showroom in Dar es Salaam. Every vehicle is inspected, approved, and ready for the road, giving you the confidence of Toyota quality in a pre-owned vehicle. 

Visit us and discover your next Toyota today.

Call: +255 746 427 981
Visit: www.automark.co.tz

#AutomarkTanzania #ToyotaCertified #PreOwnedVehicles #DarEsSalaam #DriveWithConfidence

Always request the vehicle's auction sheet/report, verify the mileage on the EAA online portal, and match it against the mileage on the vehicle for your peace of mind. This step will help ensure the accuracy of the odometer reading and give you confidence in your purchase.‚Äč

Remember, at Automark, all our vehicles undergo strict checks to ensure transparency and reliability. Drive with confidence, knowing you‚Äôve made a wise choice!‚Äč

#Automark #AdvisorTip #GenuineMileage #CarBuyingTips #SmartShopping #AutomotiveAdvice‚Äč

Buying a used car? Here are 3 things to always check first.‚Äč

1. Service history - know what has been done and when.‚Äč

2. Mileage documentation - make sure the numbers are verified.‚Äč

3. Pre-delivery inspection - every Automark vehicle is checked across 160 points before it reaches you.‚Äč

We‚Äôre excited to partner with Toyota Tanzania to bring you closer to owning the car you‚Äôve always wanted. 

With flexible and easy financing options designed around your needs, getting your car is now simpler, faster, and more within reach. Whether it‚Äôs for your daily life, your business, or a personal goal, we‚Äôre here to support your journey every step of the way. 

Speaking during the signing ceremony, our Head of Retail, Andrew Lyimo, shared:
 

‚ÄúAt Exim Bank, we are focused on going beyond traditional Banking by providing solutions that respond directly to the everyday needs of our customers. This partnership with Toyota allows us to simplify vehicle ownership by offering flexible financing options that ease the financial burden while supporting both personal mobility and business growth,‚ÄĚ said Lyimo.
 

Because it‚Äôs not just about owning a car, it‚Äôs about moving forward, growing, and enjoying the freedom to go further.

#Eximbank 
#toyotatanzania 
#Partnership

As we continue to move forward, these values remain at the heart of everything we do.
